## 🔑 Key Information

### The Problem (One Line)
Firestore rules check for `hostId` field, but data has `organizerId` field.

### The Solution (One Line)
Change all 3 instances of `hostId` to `organizerId` in security rules.

### The File to Update
Firebase Console → Firestore Database → Rules tab

### Time to Fix
5 minutes

### Impact
Discover Rides feature becomes fully functional

## 🚀 Getting Started

### Step 1: Pick a Document
Choose based on your needs and available time.

### Step 2: Read It
Follow the guide for your chosen document.

### Step 3: Apply the Fix
Update Firebase Firestore Rules.

### Step 4: Verify
Refresh your app and check Discover Rides.

### Step 5: Success!
Rides now appear! 🎉
